name: skillgrid-cli
description: Native Skillgrid CLI (install parity with hub install.sh)

scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && tsc && bun build --compile ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./bin/skillgrid --external vite --external esbuild && npm run cleanup:bun-build
scripts.build:binary: bun build --compile ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./bin/skillgrid --external vite --external esbuild && npm run cleanup:bun-build
scripts.test: npm run build:dashboard && tsc && vitest run && node --test dist/install/mcp.test.js
